name: Create Student Certificate Template
description: Design a 'Student of the Month' certificate template in ActivInspire as a single-page flipchart. The certificate must include a large decorative rectangular border framing the page, the title 'Student of the Month' centered at the top, and form fields for 'Awarded to:', 'Date:', and 'Signed:' (or 'Teacher:'), each followed by a horizontal line. Include at least two Star or Circle shapes for decoration. Save the completed template to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/student_certificate.flipchart.
